name: Breakfast Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 unbaked frozen deep dish pie shell, (9-inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the pie shell.
2. Bake in a preheated oven at 425 degrees Fahrenheit until lightly browned for about 5 minutes.
3. Cool on a wire rack.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Sprinkle the cheese, bacon, and onions evenly over the bottom of the pie shell.
6. In a bowl, beat together the eggs, milk, and salt until well combined.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese, bacon, and onion mixture.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
10. Refrigerate any leftover quiche.
